question_type: ["句子填空题", "单选题", "表格匹配题"]

content.cn_text: 导师:大家早上好。我想我们可以马上开始，让罗西和迈克做他们的报告。你想开始吗，罗西?
content.en_text: Tutor: Good morning everyone. Well I think we can start straightaway by getting Rosie and Mike to do their presentation. Would you like to start, Rosie?

content.cn_text: 罗茜:是的，嗯，我们做了一个关于当地娱乐的调查。基本上，我们试图找出学生们对镇上的娱乐活动的感受，以及他们使用娱乐的程度。
content.en_text: Rosie: Yes, well, urn, we've done a survey on local entertainment. Basically, we tried to find out how students feel about the entertainment in the town and how much they use it.

content.cn_text: 迈克:是的，所以我们把我们的项目叫做“外出活动”……
content.en_text: Mike: Yes, so we've called our project ' Out and About' ...

content.cn_text: 导师:是的，这是个好题目!《外出》。
content.en_text: Tutor: Yes, that's a good title! 'Out and About'.

content.cn_text: 罗茜:我们想知道学生们如何使用镇上的娱乐设施……他们是否能看到最新的戏剧、电影……诸如此类的事情。
content.en_text: Rosie: We wanted to find out how well students use the entertainment facilities in town... whether they get to see the latest plays, films ... that kind of thing.

content.cn_text: 导师:当然，我们校园里有自己的设施……
content.en_text: Tutor: Now, we have our own facilities on campus of course ...

content.cn_text: 罗西:是的，我们故意省略了这些，因为我们真的想在外面检查
content.en_text: Rosie: Yes, we deliberately omitted those as we really wanted to examine outside

content.cn_text: 镇上的娱乐活动与大学校园的不同。
content.en_text: entertainment in the town as opposed to on the university campus.

content.cn_text: 迈克:实际上有很多领域可供选择，不过最后我们只选择了三个大类:电影、戏剧和音乐。
content.en_text: Mike: Actually there were a lot of areas to choose from but in the end we limited ourselves to looking at three general categories: cinema, theatre and music.

content.cn_text: 老师:对。
content.en_text: Tutor: Right.

content.cn_text: 罗茜:好的。首先是电影。在城里，有三个主要的地方可以看电影。这里有新的多屏幕电影院，老公园电影院，还有深夜的奥迪翁电影院。
content.en_text: Rosie: OK. Well, first of all cinema. In the town, there are three main places where you can see films. There's the new multi-screen cinema complex, the old Park cinema, and a late-night Odeon.

content.cn_text: 迈克:如果你看这张图表……就观众规模而言，多屏综合影院占所有影院座位的75%，公园影院占20%，而深夜的奥迪翁影院只占5%。
content.en_text: Mike: So if you look at this chart ... in terms of audience size, the multi-screen complex accounts for 75% of all cinema seats, the Park Cinema, accounts for 20% of seats and the late-night Odeon has just 5% of seats.

content.cn_text: 罗茜:你可能知道，综合电影院和公园电影院放映的都是最新的电影，而深夜电影院放映的往往是邪典电影。所以，当我们采访这些学生时，我们认为Complex将是最受欢迎的电影院选择……但令人惊讶的是，这是深夜的奥迪翁。
content.en_text: Rosie: As you probably know, the Complex and the Park show all the latest films, while the late-night cinema tends to show cult films. So, when we interviewed the students, we thought the Complex would be the most popular choice of cinema ... but surprisingly it was the late-night Odeon.

content.cn_text: 迈克:对，大多数学生说，如果他们想看一部新电影，他们会在公园里等，因为公园更贵，而且离市中心更远，所以去那里要花更多的钱。
content.en_text: Mike: Yeah, and most students said that if they wanted to see a new film, they waited for it to show at the Park because the complex is more expensive and further out of town so you have to pay more to get there as well.

content.cn_text: 导师:是的，这当然增加了成本，而且显然降低了受欢迎程度。
content.en_text: Tutor: Yes, and that adds to the cost, of course, and detracts from the popularity,evidently.

content.cn_text: 罗西:接下来，我们看了剧院。这里的结果很有趣，因为，如你所知，校园里有一个很受欢迎的剧院。但是镇上还有一个舞台剧院，它非常古老，建筑风格非常漂亮。还有最近刚建成的大型现代剧院——Ashtop。
content.en_text: Rosie: Well, next, we looked at theatres. The results here were interesting because, as you know, there's a theatre on campus, which is popular. But there's also the Stage Theatre in town, which is very old and architecturally quite beautiful. And there's the large, modern theatre, the Ashtop, that has recently been built.

content.cn_text: 导师:所以你只是看了镇上的两家剧院?
content.en_text: Tutor: So you just looked at the two theatres in town?

content.cn_text: 迈克:是的。但剧院的问题是座位价格各不相同。此外，表演的类型也各不相同……所以学生们倾向于在两个地方都买座位，并且出于不同的原因喜欢使用这两个座位，如果他们想要便宜的座位，他们可以坐在离前面更远的地方。
content.en_text: Mike: Yes. But the thing about the theatres is that there's a whole variety of seat prices.Also, the types of performance vary ... so students tend to buy seats at both and like using both for different reasons and if they want cheap seats at the Ashtop, they can just sit further from the front.

content.cn_text: 罗茜:我们发现非常有趣的是，一年中有些时候学生们会去看戏剧，有些时候他们会去看电影，我们认为这与预算有关。如果你看这张图表，你会发现在11月/ 12月左右有一个高峰，那时人们去电影院的次数更多，然后在4月/ 5月的一段时间里，这两种情况都不是特别受欢迎，然后看戏剧的人数似乎逐渐减少，而电影在6月/ 7月变得相当受欢迎。
content.en_text: Rosie: What we did find that was very interesting is that there are periods during the year when students seem to go to the theatre and periods when they go to the cinema and we really think that's to do with budget. If you look at this graph, you can see that there's a peak around November/December when they go to the theatre more and then a period in April/Mav when neither is particularly popular and then theatre viewing seems to trail off virtually while the cinema becomes quite popular in June/July.

content.cn_text: 导师:嗯。我想你的结论可能是对的。
content.en_text: Tutor: Mmm. I think you're probably right about your conclusions ...

content.cn_text: 迈克:嗯，最后我们看了音乐。这一次，我们真的在调查那种小型的音乐俱乐部，他们提供民谣或专门的当地乐队。
content.en_text: Mike: Well, lastly we looked at music. And this time we were really investigating the sort of small music clubs that offer things like folk or specialise in local bands.

content.cn_text: 导师:所以不是音乐剧……
content.en_text: Tutor: So not musicals as such ...

content.cn_text: 迈克:没错。
content.en_text: Mike: That's right.

content.cn_text: 罗茜:我们看了三个小型音乐场所，我们检查了娱乐和场地的质量，并对这些进行了排名:打叉表示质量很差，打叉表示质量还可以，打叉表示非常好。首先是布鲁斯俱乐部，显然是专门演奏布鲁斯音乐的。这是一个非常小的地方，座位很少，所以我们没有给它一个很好的评价。
content.en_text: Rosie: We looked at three small music venues and we examined the quality of the entertainment and venue and gave a ranking for these: a cross meaning that the quality was poor, a tick meaning it was OK and two ticks for excellent. First of all, The Blues Club,which obviously specialises in blues music. This was a pretty small place and the seating was minimal so we didn't give that a very good rating.

content.cn_text: 迈克:不!我们真的不推荐那种。
content.en_text: Mike: No! We don't recommend that one really.

content.cn_text: 罗茜:Sansue演奏很多南美音乐，那是一个很大的地方，非常热闹，表演者也很好，所以给它打两个勾。
content.en_text: Rosie: Then The Sansue which plays a lot of South American music was a big place, very lively, good performers so two ticks for that one.

content.cn_text: 码头酒店是一个民俗场所。是当地和崭露头角的民间艺术家表演的好地方。不是最好的场地，因为它在地下室，有点暗，但是娱乐的质量是合理的，灯光非常温暖，所以我们感觉到了
content.en_text: The Pier Hotel is a folk venue ... a good place for local and up-and-coming folk artists to play. Not the best of venues as it's in a basement and a bit dark but the quality of the entertainment was reasonable and the lighting was very warm so we felt it

content.cn_text: 应该得到一个平均的评分。
content.en_text: deserved an average rating.

content.cn_text: 最后是balrock Cafe，那里有大型摇滚乐队，很受学生欢迎，我们在那里也玩得很开心，所以这家餐厅得高分。
content.en_text: Finally, there's the Baldrock Cafe which features big rock bands and is pretty popular with students and we enjoyed ourselves there as well, so top marks for that one.

content.cn_text: 导师:那你有没有从学生那里了解到他们更喜欢哪个俱乐部?
content.en_text: Tutor: And then did you get any information from the students as to which of the clubs they preferred?

groups.desc:
Questions 21- 22
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.
groups.collect:
Research details:
Title of project: $15870$
Focus of project: entertainment away from $15871$
Tip
There might be 2 to 4 people speaking in section 3. The voices will sound quite different .
The questions follow the order of the text.
Note how many different types of questions there are. In this case there are four: note completion, charts and diagrams, multiple choice and completing a chart .
Look through the questions to get an idea of the topic.
Look carefully at the graphs. Reading the questions and underlining key words will help you make sense of the graphs, e.g. Question 24: ' relative popularity ... cinemas '. Each column in the bar chart represents how popular each cinema is in relation to the other. Look at C: Which is the most popular cinema in this graph? Which is the least popular?

items.analysis: 这道题的答案是"Out and About"，因为这是学生明确提到的项目标题。在听力材料中，Mike直接说"we've called our project 'Out and About'"，这清楚地表明了项目的名称。题干要求填写项目标题，而这个短语正是对应的答案。此外，老师随后还肯定了这个标题，说"Yes, that's a good title! 'Out and About'"，进一步确认了这个答案。作为考生，你需要注意听speaker提到的项目名称，特别是在对话开始的部分，因为重要信息如项目标题通常会在早期就被提及。记住，在听力考试中，直接引用的短语或名称往往就是我们需要的答案。

这道题的关键在于理解研究项目的焦点。文中明确指出他们想研究"outside entertainment in the town"，并特别强调"as opposed to on the university campus"。这表明他们的研究重点是城镇中的娱乐设施，而不包括大学校园内的设施。题目要求填写"entertainment away from"的内容，显然是指他们排除在研究之外的地方，即大学校园。因此，正确答案是"(the) university campus"。这个答案直接对应了原文中的对比关系，准确反映了研究的范围和重点。

groups.desc:
Questions 23-26
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: Which chart shows the percentage of cinema seats provided by the different cinema houses?
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是B，因为原文中明确提到了一个图表，并给出了三家电影院的座位百分比分布。多厅影院占75%，Park电影院占20%，Odeon电影院占5%。这些百分比数据清楚地表示了不同电影院提供的座位比例，正好符合题目要求的"显示不同电影院提供的座位百分比的图表"。

items.title: Which graph shows the relative popularity of different cinemas?
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是B，因为录音中提到了一个展示三家影院座位分布百分比的图表。这种数据最适合用饼图来表示，因为饼图通常用于显示部分与整体的关系，特别是当所有部分加起来等于100%时。在这个例子中，75% + 20% + 5% = 100%，完全符合饼图的特征。因此，Graph B（饼图）是最合适的选项来展示这些影院的相对受欢迎程度。

items.title: What did Rosie and Mike realise about the two theatres?
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是B（They were equally popular），因为原文中明确提到学生倾向于在两家剧院都购买座位（"students tend to buy seats at both"），并且喜欢因为不同原因使用两家剧院（"like using both for different reasons"）。这表明两家剧院在学生中同样受欢迎，尽管可能是出于不同的原因。虽然文中提到了座位价格和表演类型的差异，但这些差异并没有导致一家剧院比另一家更受欢迎，反而使得学生出于不同原因选择两家剧院。

items.title: Which graph shows comparative attendance for cinema and theatre?
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是A，因为原文中明确提到"If you look at this graph"，然后详细描述了剧院和电影院观看人数在一年中的变化趋势。图表A显示了电影院和剧院的比较出勤率，这与原文描述的内容完全吻合。原文提到了不同月份剧院和电影院的受欢迎程度变化，这正是比较出勤率的体现。

groups.desc:
Questions 27-30
Complete the chart about the different music clubs below.
Choose the correct words in the list.

items.analysis: 原文中明确指出The Blues Club是一个很小的场所，座位非常有限，并且评价者表示"we didn't give that a very good rating"（我们没有给它一个很好的评价）。这些描述都表明了场地的质量很差，因此选择A（Poor）是最合适的答案。
文中提到The Sansue获得了"two ticks"的评价。在听力中解释的评分系统里，"two ticks"代表最高评价，相当于"excellent"。此外，描述中提到它是"a big place, very lively, good performers"，这些积极的描述也支持了最高评价。因此，正确答案是C. Excellent。

文中明确提到Pier Hotel "deserved an average rating"（应该得到一个中等的评价），这直接对应了选项B "OK"。虽然提到了一些负面因素如"in a basement and a bit dark"（在地下室，有点暗），但也指出了积极方面如"the quality of the entertainment was reasonable"（娱乐质量还不错）和"the lighting was very warm"（照明很温暖）。这些描述综合起来表明了一个中等的评价，因此正确答案是B "OK"。

文中提到Baldrock Cafe "is pretty popular with students and we enjoyed ourselves there as well, so top marks for that one"。"top marks"意味着最高评价，这直接对应选项C. Excellent。此外，说话者表示他们在那里玩得很开心，并且该场所在学生中很受欢迎，这些都进一步支持了最高评价的结论。
